title: viola × multifida
intro: Viola × multifida, also known as hybrid viola, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the viola family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Viola × multifida include relief from anxiety and insomnia, as well as potential antiviral and antioxidant properties. The plant's leaves and flowers can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, making it a popular herb in herbal medicine.
